info.title: DoorStax API
info.description: Property management and rent payment platform API. DoorStax provides tools for property managers, landlords, tenants, and owners to manage properties, units, leases, payments, maintenance tickets, and more.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, password reset, and 2FA

description.example: The kitchen sink faucet has been dripping constantly.

body.example: This is a friendly reminder that rent is due on the 1st.

message.example: Your rent of $1,500 is due on March 1st.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by action (CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, etc.)

parameters.name: objectType
parameters.description: Filter by object type (Payment, Payout, etc.)

post.description: Receives payment event notifications from the Kadima payment gateway. Events: transaction.completed, transaction.failed, transaction.refunded, recurring.processed.
